subject: english
learning_objectives: Define an expository essay and state its distinguishing features
Outline an expository essay before writing

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: An expository essay is one that requires the writer to explain a thing or a process fully. It involves writing a great deal about what distinguishes the subject from all other things and may also involve some description.

sections.heading: Sample Outline 1 – Sanitation
sections.content:
Question: Write an article for a local newspaper on the need to improve sanitation in your area.

Introduction: The state of sanitation / definition
Paragraph 2: The need for sanitation
Paragraph 3: First way to improve (detailed)
Paragraph 4: Second way to improve (detailed)
Paragraph 5: Third way to improve (detailed)
Conclusion: Hope that the new measures will be used

sections.heading: Sample Outline 2 – A Friend in Need
sections.content:
Question: Write an article to illustrate the saying 'A Friend in Need is a Friend Indeed'.

Introduction: Say who your friend is
Paragraph 2: How friendly you are
Paragraph 3: Another proof of friendship
Paragraph 4: An incident that proves the saying
Conclusion
